Class DumperSettings

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.dumper.DumperSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
public class DumperSettings extends Object implements Settings
Dumper settings cover all options related explicitly (only) to file dumping.

Settings introduced by BoostedYAML follow builder design pattern, e.g. you may build your own settings using DumperSettings.builder() //configure// .build()

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    DumperSettings.Builder
    Builder for dumper settings; wrapper for SnakeYAML Engine's DumpSettingsBuilder class which is more detailed, provides more options and possibilities, hides options which should not be configured.
    static enum 
    DumperSettings.Encoding
    Represents supported encoding.

    • builder

      public static DumperSettings.Builder builder()
      Returns a new builder.
      Returns:
      the new builder

    • builder

      public static DumperSettings.Builder builder(org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.api.DumpSettingsBuilder builder)
      Creates and returns a new builder from the given, already created SnakeYAML Engine settings builder.

      Note that the given builder is not cloned, so it is in the caller's best interest to never change it's settings from now on.

      Please note that DumperSettings.Builder.setAnchorGenerator(Supplier) still has to be called (if you want to alter the default), as they are not part of the Engine's settings.

      Parameters:
      builder - the underlying builder
      Returns:
      the new builder

    • builder

      public static DumperSettings.Builder builder(DumperSettings settings)
      Returns a new builder with the same configuration as the given settings.
      Parameters:
      settings - preset settings
      Returns:
      the new builder
